summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StoryCraft AI Phase 2 with MiniMax integration and AWS S3 media storage. Backend APIs working well (88% success rate). All new Phase 2 media generation endpoints functional. Frontend auth and core pages working but with session stability issues during navigation.

minor_issues.issue: Request timeout on job status checks
minor_issues.impact: Polling for long-running jobs may fail

integration_issues.issue: Auth sessions getting lost during page navigation, causing redirects to login

passed_tests: Backend - Audio generation with voice_style parameter
Frontend - Story Setup form renders with all options

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (auth works, core pages load, but navigation issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication session persistence to prevent logout during navigation. The JWT token appears to be getting lost when navigating between pages, causing users to be redirected to login unexpectedly.
